title: Tenebrous Lands
description: This mod is about mobs, mainly scary ones that will make minecraft's plain gameplay a lot more enjoyable.The player can now encounter unique mobs with unique animations and sounds which will frighten him.
body:
This mod is about mobs, mainly scary ones that will make minecraft's plain gameplay a lot more enjoyable.The player can now encounter unique mobs with unique animations and sounds which will frighten him. This mod is expected to have a lot more coming because it has some potential and hopefully you will all like it in the near future!

The Mod Has Now:

- Custom Sounds

- Custom Mobs

- Custom Animation for Mobs

The Things we want to add in the future:

- More Mobs with custom animations

- A Boss Fight

- New Spooky Structures

- New Gear such as armor and tools

- New Light Sources

Also, for this mod to work you'll need GeckoLib installed and forge installer as usual depending on your selected version, either 1.19.2 or 1.18.2

On the other hand, huge thanks to BisectHosting. Get 25% off if you use code "Tenebrous"

The link to their site -> https://www.bisecthosting.com/minecraft-servers#package-features-car
This Mod Is Also available on curseforge -> https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tenebrous-lands
